title: AdapterConfig
description: Adapter configuration shapes for all supported transports. Each adapter has its own frozen config dataclass.

oneOf.title: MatrixConfig
oneOf.description: Immutable configuration for the Matrix adapter.

adapter_id.description: Unique identifier for this adapter instance.

homeserver.description: Matrix homeserver URL (must start with 'http://' or 'https://').

user_id.description: Fully-qualified Matrix user ID (must start with '@').

device_id.description: Device ID. Internal — discovered via whoami() on login.

room_allowlist.description: Optional set of room IDs to accept messages from. Null means all rooms.

metadata_embedding_mode.description: How metadata is embedded in messages.

store_path.description: E2EE store path. Internal — derived by runtime.

sync_timeout_ms.description: Timeout in milliseconds for long-polling sync requests.

require_encrypted_rooms.description: Whether to only operate in encrypted rooms.

auto_join_rooms.description: Canonical Matrix room IDs ('!localpart:server') to auto-join on startup.

origin_label.description: Operator-facing human-readable source label for relay prefixes.

oneOf.title: MeshtasticConfig
oneOf.description: Immutable configuration for the Meshtastic adapter.

adapter_id.description: Unique identifier for this adapter instance.

host.description: Hostname or IP for TCP connections.

serial_port.description: Serial device path for serial connections.

ble_address.description: BLE MAC address for BLE connections.

origin_label.description: Operator-facing human-readable source label for relay prefixes.

default_channel.description: Default radio channel index for outbound messages.

channel_mapping.description: Mapping of channel index to human-readable channel name (display labels only).

startup_backlog_suppress_seconds.description: Seconds after start to suppress stale backlog packets.

sync_timeout_ms.description: Timeout in milliseconds for sync operations.

matrix_relay_prefix.description: Template prepended to messages relayed from Meshtastic to Matrix.

radio_relay_prefix.description: Template prepended to messages relayed from Matrix to Meshtastic radio.

mmrelay_compatibility.description: Embed mmrelay-compatible Meshtastic metadata in Matrix event content.

max_text_bytes.description: Maximum UTF-8 byte budget for final radio text after rendering.

queue_send_max_attempts.description: Maximum send attempts per queued item (first attempt + retries).

outbound_mode.description: Controls whether outbound radio sends are enabled.

oneOf.title: MeshCoreConfig
oneOf.description: Immutable configuration for the MeshCore adapter.

adapter_id.description: Unique identifier for this adapter instance.

host.description: Hostname or IP for TCP connections.

serial_port.description: Serial device path for serial connections.

ble_address.description: BLE MAC address for BLE connections.

origin_label.description: Operator-facing human-readable source label for relay prefixes.

default_channel.description: Default radio channel index for outbound messages.

channel_mapping.description: Mapping of channel index to human-readable channel name.

sync_timeout_ms.description: Timeout in milliseconds for sync operations.

pubkey.description: Optional MeshCore public key as a hex string.

node_config.description: Opaque dict for future node-specific settings. Must not contain secret keys.

max_text_bytes.description: Maximum UTF-8 byte budget for final radio text after rendering.

ble_pin.description: Optional BLE pairing PIN. Sensitive; forwarded only to the SDK create_ble call; never exposed in diagnostics or logs.

meshcore_relay_prefix.description: Optional relay prefix template prepended to outbound text before byte-budget truncation. Empty string means no prefix. Uses {placeholder} syntax resolved by the shared prefix formatter.

oneOf.title: LxmfConfig
oneOf.description: Immutable configuration for the LXMF adapter.

adapter_id.description: Unique identifier for this adapter instance.

connection_type.description: Connection mode. 'fake' for testing, 'reticulum' for real LXMF.

display_name.description: Optional display name for LXMF announces.

stamp_cost.description: Default stamp cost. 0 means no stamp required.

origin_label.description: Operator-facing human-readable source label for relay prefixes.

default_channel.description: Default radio channel index for outbound messages.

metadata_embedding.description: Whether to embed MEDRE metadata envelopes in LXMF fields.

identity_path.description: Path to a Reticulum identity file.

storage_path.description: Path for LXMF LXMRouter persistent storage. Required for 'reticulum' mode.

announce_interval_seconds.description: Interval in seconds between periodic LXMF announces for mesh path discovery. 0 disables.

lxmf_relay_prefix.description: Optional relay prefix template prepended to outbound LXMF message body text. Empty string means no prefix. Uses {placeholder} syntax resolved by the shared prefix formatter.
